_publications._publicationTitle: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting to Characterize Childhood and Young Adult Brain Tumors.

_contextSnippet: In this group, MRF-derived T1 and T2 values were distinct from CWM (T1 p = 0.0008, T2 p = 0.0084).
details: MRF-derived T1 and T2 values distinguished peritumor regions from contralateral white matter (T1 p=0.0008, T2 p=0.0084)
